labels.notes: VISION NAME MISLABEL — session is Louise Simon (1952-05-11) but labeled Jerry Zandbergen. First 6 vision calls (17:39:17-17:41:59, first 5 min of session) all returned Jerry because the PREVIOUS patient's (Jerry, eeb4d85f ended 17:41) chart was still open. By the time Louise's chart was opened (18:02), PatientNameTracker already had 6 Jerry votes. Later alternation (Louise 3, Jerry 5 more) couldn't overcome the early lead. Recency weighting + DOB invalidation didn't fire because Jerry's DOB was captured before Louise's. Cryotherapy discussed not applied: 'I could spray them with liquid nitrogen, and sometimes they fall off' — conditional. Z117A + E542A wrongly billed. Dx 799 fallback needs specific code for acrochordons / chronic conditions listed.
